landing.heroEyebrow: A professional companion platform for executives, founders, and discerning travellers.
landing.heroDesc: A rose blooms perfectly not because it is gentle with everything — but because it knows when to bear a thorn. ARETON is a house for professional companions who understand the grammar of standing, grace, and curated fulfilment.
landing.subRosaBody: In Roman halls, a rose suspended from the ceiling signalled that everything said below it was to be kept in confidence. ARETON carries that discipline forward: every meeting is shielded in privacy, every identity verified, every transaction sealed in escrow before the evening begins.
landing.subRosaQuote: “Quicquid sub rosa dictum — whatever is said beneath the rose, there it remains.”
landing.essencesLead: ARETON does not chase surfaces. It honours the three essences that have clung to the rose across the centuries — and to every encounter worth remembering.

kemapanan.title: Standing
kemapanan.desc: The rose was never a wildflower; it belonged to palaces and to Venus herself. ARETON is built for professionals who understand that the highest standard is not negotiable — strict verification, curated portfolios, and a 24/7 support cadre form the floor, not the ceiling.

keindahan.title: Beauty
keindahan.desc: For Rumi and Hafez, the rose was the beloved — beauty is not an ornament but an invitation to be more fully present. ARETON chooses companions who treat intellect, conversation, and quiet presence as inseparable from beauty.

kepuasan.title: Fulfilment
kepuasan.desc: A rose is still a rose, Shakespeare wrote, by any other name. What matters is its essence. ARETON measures success by the worthiness of the experience — not by labels, but by the afterglow left when the night has ended.

landing.servicesLead: Every engagement has its own tempo. We cast companions who match the cadence and context — formal, informal, strategic, ceremonial.

meeting.title: Meeting Companion
meeting.desc: Professional companion for business meetings, presentations, and senior negotiations.

dinner.title: Dinner Companion
dinner.desc: Elegant, literate, etiquette-fluent partner for formal and intimate dinners.

event.title: Event Companion
event.desc: A composed plus-one for galas, weddings, and reputational networking events.

business.title: Business Assistant
business.desc: Professional secretary for domestic and international business travel.

landing.tierLead: In the Victorian language of flowers, each rose varietal carried its own meaning. ARETON marks every partner classification with the rose it resembles most.

silver.services: Casual dining and poised social occasions.

diamond.services: VIP escort, diplomat / C-suite companion, international travel.

landing.thornsTitle: The craft of curating a rose
landing.thornsLead: The 13th-century Roman de la Rose taught that the rose must be earned through a journey — not plucked from the hedge. Our curation works the same way.

petal1.title: Identity Verification
petal1.desc: Formal eKYC, background checks, and personal interviews before any partner is welcomed.

petal2.title: Curated Portfolio
petal2.desc: Every profile is reviewed by our editors for language, etiquette, and professional relevance.

petal3.title: Continuous Stewardship
petal3.desc: Granular ratings, audit logs, and per-booking reviews keep the standard resolutely high.

petal4.title: 24/7 Safety Net
petal4.desc: SOS button, live tracking, a support cadre, and escrow for every rupiah you entrust.

landing.invitationLead: When you are ready for a meeting worth remembering, the rose is already waiting.
